emails.subject: California Utilities - Bankruptcy Risk
emails.body: Jeff Please keep George McClellan, Kevin McGowan and Stuart Staley informed of regulatory developments in California. Thanks, and call me if you have any questions. Lisa Forwarded by Lisa Yoho/NA/Enron on 12/21/2000 07:29 AM George McClellan@ECT 12/18/2000 02:40 PM
